title: Most people get these 3 AI terms wrong
summary: Jeff Su clarifies three commonly misunderstood AI terms. Hallucination is the same mechanism as creativity, context window acts like a fixed-size whiteboard that drops old information when full, and tokens are chunks of text that determine usage costs and limits on free plans.
